items.markdown:
Business analytics is `the practice of using data, statistical analysis, and quantitative methods to examine past business performance and guide future decision-making` . It transforms raw organizational data into actionable insights, allowing companies to improve operations, forecast outcomes, and gain a competitive edge.[](https://www.park.edu/blog/what-is-business-analytics/) [[1]](https://www.park.edu/blog/what-is-business-analytics/)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V5sw9PghVio&t=2)

The 4 Types of Business Analytics

The field is generally broken down into four distinct levels of analysis:[](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/0MWLVnntVu4) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/0MWLVnntVu4)[[2]](https://onlinedegrees.scu.edu/media/blog/data-analytics-driving-better-business-decisions)

- **Descriptive Analytics:** Analyzes historical data to understand what has already happened (e.g., tracking last quarter's sales figures).
- **Diagnostic Analytics:** Examines data to uncover the root causes of past events (e.g., figuring out *why* regional sales dropped).
- **Predictive Analytics:** Uses historical data, statistical modeling, and machine learning to forecast future trends and probabilities.
- **Prescriptive Analytics:** Recommends specific actions to optimize business performance and achieve desired outcomes (e.g., determining the most profitable pricing strategy).[](https://www.mtu.edu/business/undergraduate/business-analytics/what-is/) [[1]](https://www.mtu.edu/business/undergraduate/business-analytics/what-is/)[[2]](https://www.imd.org/blog/digital-transformation/business-analytics/)[[3]](https://www.park.edu/blog/what-is-business-analytics/)[[4]](https://www.oracle.com/africa/analytics/what-is-business-analytics/)[[5]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V5sw9PghVio&t=2)

Common Use Cases Business analytics is applied across nearly every industry to solve real-world problems:[](https://www.mtu.edu/business/undergraduate/business-analytics/what-is/) [[1]](https://www.mtu.edu/business/undergraduate/business-analytics/what-is/)

- **Marketing:** Analyzing customer data to personalize campaigns and predict customer churn.
- **Operations:** Optimizing supply chains and planning inventory levels based on demand forecasts.
- **Finance:** Forecasting future revenues, managing risk, and evaluating investment opportunities.
- **Human Resources:** Identifying factors that predict employee turnover and tracking performance metrics.[](https://www.mtu.edu/business/undergraduate/business-analytics/what-is/) [[1]](https://www.mtu.edu/business/undergraduate/business-analytics/what-is/)[[2]](https://www.park.edu/blog/what-is-business-analytics/)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V5sw9PghVio&t=2)[[4]](https://trainings.internshala.com/blog/applications-of-business-analytics/)

Core Technologies and Skills Professionals in this field blend business strategy with technical skills. They rely on standard tools for data processing and visualization, including:[](https://www.mtu.edu/business/undergraduate/business-analytics/what-is/) [[1]](https://www.mtu.edu/business/undergraduate/business-analytics/what-is/)

- **Programming & Databases:** SQL and Python.
- **Data Visualization & Reporting:** Microsoft Excel, Tableau, and Microsoft Power BI.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kMQpXRbtpjU&t=4) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kMQpXRbtpjU&t=4)[[2]](https://www.cio.com/article/191157/what-is-business-analytics-using-data-to-predict-business-outcomes.html)[[3]](https://www.ycp.edu/news/what-is-business-analytics)[[4]](https://www.acte.in/business-analysis-vs-analytics-differences)[[5]](https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/careers/marketing-vs-business-analytics-which-degree-offers-better-global-payoff/articleshow/122979451.cms)

To dive deeper into the discipline and explore certifications, educational paths, or career tracks, consult the [IBM Business Analytics](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/business-analytics) overview or the comprehensive [Coursera Business Analysis Guide](https://www.coursera.org/articles/what-does-a-business-analyst-do-and-how-to-become-one).[[1]](https://karaleise.com/what-is-a-business-analyst-career-guide/)[[2]](https://soc.jainuniversity.ac.in/program/bcom-business-analytics-colleges-in-bangalore)[[3]](https://www.coursera.org/resources/how-to-start-learning-data-analysis)[[4]](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/chetan-d-946172132_completion-certificate-for-business-analysis-activity-7217890491961331713-TI4b)
